channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: Retrospective Harness Optimization: Improving LLM Agents via Self-Preference over Trajectory Rollouts

item.title: When the Chain of Thought Knows Better: Failure Modes in Multi-Turn Reasoning Models
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (58 comments)

item.title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.CL — Data tells stories that shape society; the data journalist's job is to turn raw information into stories non-experts can trust. A high-quality news feature takes a newsroom team weeks: hunting for context, running statistics, choosing an angle, and designing visuals. Recent agents handle individu...

item.title: Lip Forcing: Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion for Real-time Lip Synchronization
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Diffusion-based lip synchronization models achieve strong visual quality and audio-visual alignment, but full-sequence bidirectional attention and many denoising steps make them impractical for real-time inference. We present Lip Forcing, to our knowledge the first autoregressive diffusion method...

item.title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — We introduce WorldOlympiad, a benchmark for diagnosing video-based world models across physical faithfulness, geometric consistency, and interaction fidelity. While existing benchmarks often focus on visual quality, semantic alignment, or short-term temporal coherence, they provide limited insigh...

item.title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — This paper introduces ARM, a discrete representation-based AutoRegressive Model that unifies image understanding, generation, and editing within a next-token prediction framework. ARM is built on three efforts: first, we train a discrete semantic visual tokenizer that maps images into compact tok...

item.title: UniPET: a universal network for high-quality PET image denoising across varied dose reduction factors
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Most existing deep learning-based PET image denoising methods assume a fixed and known dose reduction factor (DRF) for low-dose PET images. However, these methods encounter significant performance degradation when the DRF varies beyond the assumed one in practical applications. To address the cha...

item.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.AI — In this paper, we propose EEVEE, the first multi-dataset test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents, enabling test-time prompt learning under real-world task streams. Existing methods are largely designed for single-dataset settings, while real-world applications require models to handle ...

item.title: U-TTT: Towards Generalizable PET Image Denoising via Test-Time Training
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Existing deep learning models for Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image denoising often suffer from severe performance degradation under distribution shifts, fundamentally restricting their robust clinical deployment. This lack of generalization stems from the conventional paradigm of fixed-pa...

item.title: Andyyyy64 / whichllm
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (68 comments) · ⭐ 633 GitHub stars today — Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

item.title: mvanhorn / last30days-skill
item.description: ⭐ 3.2k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 38.2k total stars — AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: google / skills
item.description: ⭐ 680 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 13.0k total stars — Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

item.title: The Top AI Agents You Need to Know Right Now
item.description: 🆕 New article — <div class="medium-feed-item"><p class="medium-feed-image"><a href="https://medium.com/techcraft-chronicles/the-top-ai-agents-you-need-to-know-right-now-a8528580b74d?source=rss------ai_agent-5"><img src="https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1408/1*-rMtpuaX3h9oN59sPga7rg.png" width="1408" /></a></p...

item.title: shareAI-lab / learn-claude-code
item.description: ⭐ 228 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 65.8k total stars — Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

item.title: Panniantong / Agent-Reach
item.description: ⭐ 1.6k GitHub stars today · ⭐ 25.8k total stars — Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
